# Copilot Instructions

This is a hobby MVP project. Prioritize speed and simplicity over hardening.

## Main Rule
- No security complications.
- Do not block progress with RLS, strict auth rules, or enterprise-grade controls.
- Optimize for getting features working end-to-end fast.
- If exposing frontend keys speeds up development for this MVP, allow it.

## Build Style
- Prefer the simplest implementation that works.
- Avoid over-engineering.
- Keep code practical, direct, and easy to iterate.

## Scope
- Focus on making the MVP functional first.
- Security hardening is deferred until after MVP validation.

> Note: This guidance is for local/hobby MVP development only and is not suitable for production.
